title: The Jewish Soul: Five Levels of the Neshamah
title_zh: 犹太灵魂:灵魂的五个层次
description: Understanding nefesh, ruach, neshamah, chayah, and yechidah — the five levels of the soul in Jewish mysticism.
description_zh: 理解内费什、鲁阿赫、内沙玛、哈亚和耶希达——犹太神秘主义中灵魂的五个层次。
description_he: הבנת נפש, רוח, נשמה, חיה ויחידה - חמש רמות הנשמה במיסטיקה היהודית.

chinese_dynasty_references.context: When the Zohar was written (approximately 1280 CE)
When the Tanya was written (1796 CE)

cultural_parallels.description: Vital energy flowing through all living things
Emotional and ethical dimension of humanity
Neo-Confucian concept of the principle governing the universe
Experience of becoming one with ultimate reality

key_figures.name: Rabbi Schneur Zalman of Liadi
key_figures.contribution: Author of Tanya, explained the five levels of the soul

primary_sources: Tanya by Rabbi Schneur Zalman (Qing Dynasty, 1796 CE)
